mapper.update: UPDATE bluenote_note.note_like SET like_status = 'ACTIVE', liked_at = #{likedAt}, canceled_at = NULL, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND like_status = 'CANCELED'
UPDATE bluenote_note.note_collection SET collection_status = 'ACTIVE', collected_at = #{collectedAt}, canceled_at = NULL, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND collection_status = 'CANCELED'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bluenote_note.note_like WHERE note_id = #{noteId} AND like_status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bluenote_note.note_collection WHERE note_id = #{noteId} AND collection_status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bluenote_note.note_like note_like INNER JOIN bluenote_note.note note ON note.note_id = note_like.note_id WHERE note_like.author_id = #{authorId} AND note_like.like_status = 'ACTIVE' AND note.author_id = #{authorId} AND note.note_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND note.visibility = 'PUBLIC' AND note.deleted = 0
